hook: Trust in early dating grows more from consistency than from intensity.
body: Small repeated signs of steadiness create more security than dramatic bursts of attention.

hook: Men often overvalue emotional spikes and undervalue whether someone reliably follows through.
body: Early trust is built by congruence: words, timing, and behavior lining up often enough to relax the nervous system.

body: A person who keeps simple plans and responds in a stable way is usually giving stronger relationship material than someone dazzling and erratic.
